footer.aboutText: Karaoğlu Universal Mühendislik has been undertaking pioneering projects in the construction, engineering, and mechanical systems sectors with its quarter-century of experience.

slider.subtitle: The Region's Strong Infrastructure and Superstructure Solution Partner
slider.title: We Build Government Investments with Diligence
slider.slide2_subtitle: From Ankara to Turkey; 10+ years of experience, strong machinery park and financial adequacy
slider.slide3_subtitle: We have our signature on projects from the Silk Road Coastal Band to TOKİ Housing

about.subtitle: Why Us?
about.title:
THE RELIABLE SOLUTION PARTNER FOR
PUBLIC PROJECTS IN
VAN AND ANKARA
about.desc1: Karaoğlu Universal Mühendislik carries out public contracting works throughout Turkey with its offices based in Ankara and Van.
about.desc2: Our company has successfully completed 64 projects to date, most of which consist of construction and engineering works for public institutions.
about.desc3: We act with 'state seriousness' in construction, infrastructure and superstructure projects; delivering Hospital, School, TOKİ housing and Road projects on time.

services.housing: TOKİ Housing: Mass Housing in Van and Surrounding Provinces

slogan.text: "Reliability, technical competence and on-time delivery guarantee in public projects."
slogan.author: — Karaoğlu Universal Mühendislik

cta.title: CONTACT
cta.desc: You can contact our Ankara or Van office for public projects and technical consultancy services.

aboutPage.title:
ENGINEERING WITH HIGH TECHNICAL CAPACITY
MASTERING PUBLIC PROCUREMENT LEGISLATION
aboutPage.desc1: As Karaoğlu Universal Engineering, we focus on 'contracting and project management' rather than 'build-and-sell' in the construction sector.
aboutPage.desc2: Our firm, based in İpekyolu/Van, has been the solution partner of many official institutions, especially Van Investment Monitoring (YİKOB), Ministry of Environment and Urbanization, and Local Governments.

legal.title: Legislative Mastery
legal.desc: Full mastery of the Public Procurement Law No. 4734 and related regulations.

technical.title: Technical Capacity
technical.desc: Experience in smoothly managing final acceptance processes.

financial.title: Financial Strength
financial.desc: Ability to re-finance large-scale public projects with own equity.

machinery.title: Machinery Park
machinery.desc: Constantly renewed machinery park that increases the speed and quality of projects.

aboutPage.missionDesc1: As Karaoğlu Universal Engineering, with our public contractor identity since 2014; our main mission is to build high-quality and sustainable structures that are fully compliant with the legislation in the infrastructure, superstructure and engineering projects we carry out for public institutions and organizations.
aboutPage.missionDesc2: In line with public procurement legislation, technical specifications and contract provisions; we act based on transparency, accountability and public interest in all planning, implementation and delivery processes.
aboutPage.missionDesc3: With the understanding of timely and complete delivery of work, we consider the effective and efficient use of public resources as our primary responsibility.
aboutPage.missionDesc4: With our expert technical staff, experienced field teams and strong organizational structure; we aim to be a reliable solution partner in public projects and to add permanent values to the infrastructure and superstructure development of our country.
aboutPage.visionDesc1: To be an engineering and contracting company that stands out with its reliability, technical competence and adherence to work discipline in the field of public contracting on a national scale, and is preferred and referred to by public institutions.
aboutPage.visionDesc2: By closely following developing engineering technologies, current legislation and quality standards; to produce projects that are environmentally friendly, long-lasting and have high technical standards.
aboutPage.visionDesc3: With an understanding that constantly improves its corporate structure and invests in human resources and quality management systems; to grow sustainably and steadily in the public projects of the future.

faqPage.noResults: No results found for your search.
faqPage.ctaDesc: Our team will be happy to assist you.

defaults.q1: In which regions are your projects carried out?
defaults.a1: Our projects are mostly carried out in Van and surrounding provinces. We are actively working on public, housing and infrastructure projects.
defaults.q2: How can I apply to get an offer?
defaults.a2: You can contact us by filling out the form on our contact page or directly from our phone number.
defaults.q3: How much experience does your company have?
defaults.a3: We have been operating in the construction and engineering sector since 2014. During this time, dozens of projects have been successfully completed.
defaults.a4: Yes, we have ISO 9001 quality certificate and sectoral certificates.
defaults.q5: What are your social responsibility projects?
defaults.a5: We carry out various projects in education, sports and social fields. School donations, scholarship programs and sports facilities are the leading ones.

kvkk.title: Clarification Text on the Protection and Processing of Personal Data
kvkk.intro: As Karaoğlu Universal Engineering Ltd. Co. ("Company" or "Data Controller"), in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Law No. 6698 ("KVKK"), we would like to inform you about the processing and protection of your personal data within the scope of the services we offer you and your rights.
kvkk.dataCollectionTitle: 1. Collection, Processing of Personal Data and Purposes of Processing
kvkk.dataCollectionText: Your collected personal data may be processed in accordance with the conditions specified in Articles 5 and 6 of the KVKK for the purposes of benefiting from the services offered by our Company, ensuring the legal and commercial security of our Company, and determining our commercial and business strategies.
kvkk.dataTransferTitle: 2. To Whom and For What Purpose the Processed Personal Data Can Be Transferred
kvkk.dataTransferText: Your personal data may be transferred to legally authorized public institutions and private persons within the framework of the personal data transfer conditions specified in Articles 8 and 9 of the KVKK, in line with the realization of the purposes stated above.
kvkk.dataMethodTitle: 3. Method and Legal Reason for Collecting Personal Data
kvkk.dataMethodText: Your personal data is collected in accordance with the legal legislation through various methods, including every kind of oral, written or electronic environment, our website, communication forms and e-mail notifications.
kvkk.rightsTitle: 4. Rights of the Data Subject within the Scope of KVKK
kvkk.rightsText: In accordance with Article 11 of the KVKK, data subjects have the right to; learn whether their personal data has been processed, request information regarding this if it has been processed, learn the purpose of processing and whether it is used in accordance with its purpose, and request correction if it is processed incompletely or incorrectly.

privacyPage.heroSubtitle: Your data security is important to us
privacyPage.introText: As Karaoğlu Universal Engineering Ltd. Co., we respect the privacy of the users visiting our website and are committed to protecting your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and how we protect it.
privacyPage.collectedDataIntro: We may collect the following information through our website:

collectedDataList.i1: Name, email, and phone information sent via contact forms

privacyPage.dataUsageIntro: The information we collect is used for the following purposes:

dataUsageList.i1: To respond to your contact requests
dataUsageList.i2: To provide information about our services

privacyPage.cookiesText: Our website uses cookies to improve the user experience. Cookies are small text files saved on your device by your browser. You can disable cookies from your browser settings.
privacyPage.securityText: We implement technical and administrative security measures to protect your personal information. Your data is protected against unauthorized access.
privacyPage.sharingText: Your personal information is not shared with third parties except for legal obligations. Your data is not sold or rented.
privacyPage.contactText: You can contact us for your questions about our privacy policy:
privacyPage.updateNote: This privacy policy may be updated as necessary.
